---
title: "Flow Cytometry Analysis: <<TITLE>>"
author: "Claude + EYW"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
    theme: flatly
    highlight: default
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 14
    fig_height: 6
---

<!--
TEMPLATE USAGE
  Copy this file into the project root as flow_cytometry_analysis.Rmd, then adapt:
    1. Set root.dir below to the project directory.
    2. Fill the USER PARAMETERS block.
    3. Wire real column names / regexes into the reshape chunks
       (see references/flowjo-csv-format.md).
    4. Duplicate the analysis section once per measurement family
       (see references/plotting-patterns.md).
  Replace every <<PLACEHOLDER>>. Delete sections you don't need (e.g. QC).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '<<ABSOLUTE/PROJECT/PATH/>>')
```

# Overview

<<One paragraph: what is being compared, which markers/analytes, how fold-change is defined
(per replicate vs the control level).>>

---

# 1 · Setup

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyplots)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
# Use tidyplots' default theme — do NOT source plotting_fxns.R / theme_Publication().

# ── USER PARAMETERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CTRL_LEVEL <- "<<none>>"          # control level for fold-change (e.g. "none", "DMSO")
X_VAR      <- "<<cytokine>>"      # x-axis factor (metadata column name)
COLOR_VAR  <- "<<treatment>>"    # comparison / color factor (metadata column name)
FACET_VAR  <- "<<marker>>"       # faceting variable (the analyte; created during reshape)

X_LEVELS     <- c(<<"IL2","IL4",...,"none">>)   # x-axis order; put CTRL_LEVEL where it belongs
COLOR_LEVELS <- c(<<"VLP","recomb">>)            # comparison order
GEOMETRY     <- "bar"                            # "bar" (means) | "violin" | "box"

COLORS <- c(<<VLP = "#1b9e77", recomb = "#d95f02">>)  # named per COLOR_LEVELS

# ── PDF export ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Every plot is written to PLOT_DIR as a PDF *and* shown in the report. Piping a
# finished plot through save_and_show() saves it at the physical size set by
# adjust_size() (tidyplots::save_plot honours that), then returns it so knitr still
# embeds it in the HTML. Give each plot a short, unique, filename-safe name.
PLOT_DIR <- "plots"
dir.create(PLOT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

save_and_show <- function(p, name) {
  tidyplots::save_plot(p, file.path(PLOT_DIR, paste0(name, ".pdf")))
  p
}
```

---

# 2 · Data Loading & Wrangling

## 2.1 Load raw files

```{r load}
metadata_raw <- read_csv("tables/metadata.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
# One read_csv per measurement CSV:
meas_raw     <- read_csv("tables/<<measurements>>.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## 2.2 Derive constants & colors

```{r derive-constants}
# Auto-fill colors for any comparison level not explicitly named above.
new_lv <- setdiff(COLOR_LEVELS, names(COLORS))
if (length(new_lv)) {
  auto   <- setdiff(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8, "Set2"), unname(COLORS))
  COLORS <- c(COLORS, setNames(auto[seq_along(new_lv)], new_lv))
}
cat("x-axis   :", paste(X_LEVELS,     collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("compare  :", paste(COLOR_LEVELS, collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

## 2.3 Clean metadata

```{r clean-meta}
metadata <- metadata_raw %>%
  rename(plate = GROUPNAME, well = `$WELLID`) %>%
  mutate(
    replicate = as.integer(replicate),
    !!X_VAR     := factor(.data[[X_VAR]],     levels = X_LEVELS),
    !!COLOR_VAR := factor(.data[[COLOR_VAR]], levels = COLOR_LEVELS)
    # cast any per-group analyte column to a factor here too.
  )
```

## 2.4 Reshape measurements to long

```{r reshape}
# "n/a" channels must become NA before any numeric op (see flowjo-csv-format.md).
parse_num <- function(x) as.numeric(na_if(as.character(x), "n/a"))

# ── Pattern A: every column is a marker of the same family (e.g. all frequencies) ──
df_long <- meas_raw %>%
  rename(plate = GROUPNAME, well = `$WELLID`) %>%
  select(-`Sample:`) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(plate, well), names_to = "col_name", values_to = "value",
               values_transform = list(value = as.character)) %>%
  mutate(
    value  = parse_num(value),
    marker = str_trim(str_extract(col_name, "<<(?<=/)([^/|]+)(?=\\s*\\| Freq)>>"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(marker)) %>%
  inner_join(metadata, by = c("plate", "well"))

# ── Pattern B: one analyte per group; pick the right value per row by metadata ──
# Use case_when() on a metadata column (e.g. fluorophore) to select among stat columns,
# OR inner_join on the analyte-naming metadata column. See flowjo-csv-format.md.

df_long %>% count(marker) %>%
  kbl(caption = "Row counts per marker") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("condensed", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

## 2.5 Fold-change vs control

```{r fold-change}
# Key on everything EXCEPT the normalization axis (here, X_VAR holds CTRL_LEVEL).
fc_keys  <- c("marker", COLOR_VAR, "replicate")

baseline <- df_long %>%
  filter(.data[[X_VAR]] == CTRL_LEVEL) %>%
  select(all_of(fc_keys), baseline = value)

df_long <- df_long %>%
  left_join(baseline, by = fc_keys) %>%
  mutate(fold_change = value / baseline,
         log2FC      = log2(fold_change)) %>%
  select(-baseline)
```

```{r write-processed, include=FALSE}
df_long %>% write_csv("tables/<<measurements>>_processed.csv")
```

## 2.6 Summaries

```{r summarise}
sem <- function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(x)))

summ <- df_long %>%
  group_by(.data[[COLOR_VAR]], .data[[X_VAR]], marker) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(!is.na(value)),
            mean_v = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), sem_v = sem(value),
            mean_fc = mean(fold_change, na.rm = TRUE), sem_fc = sem(fold_change),
            .groups = "drop")
```

---

# 3 · <<Measurement family>> {.tabset}

<!-- A small helper keeps the three subtabs DRY. Geometry is switched by GEOMETRY. -->

```{r plot-helper}
add_geometry <- function(p) {
  if (GEOMETRY == "violin") p %>% add_violin() %>% add_data_points()
  else if (GEOMETRY == "box") p %>% add_boxplot() %>% add_data_points()
  else p %>% add_mean_bar(alpha = 0.7) %>% add_sd_errorbar() %>% add_data_points()
}
```

## 3.1 Raw

```{r raw, fig.height=4, fig.width=20}
df_long %>%
  tidyplot(x = .data[[X_VAR]], y = value, color = .data[[COLOR_VAR]]) %>%
  add_geometry() %>%
  adjust_colors(new_colors = COLORS) %>%
  adjust_title("<<Metric>> — Raw") %>%
  adjust_x_axis_title("<<x label>>") %>%
  adjust_y_axis_title("<<value>> ± SD") %>%
  split_plot(by = marker, ncol = <<N>>) %>%
  adjust_size(width = 80, height = 40) %>%
  save_and_show("<<metric>>_raw")
```

## 3.2 Fold change vs `r CTRL_LEVEL`

```{r fc, fig.height=4, fig.width=20}
df_long %>%
  filter(.data[[X_VAR]] != CTRL_LEVEL) %>%
  tidyplot(x = .data[[X_VAR]], y = fold_change, color = .data[[COLOR_VAR]]) %>%
  add_reference_lines(y = 1) %>%
  add_geometry() %>%
  adjust_colors(new_colors = COLORS) %>%
  adjust_title("<<Metric>> — Fold change vs control") %>%
  adjust_x_axis_title("<<x label>>") %>%
  adjust_y_axis_title("Fold change ± SD") %>%
  split_plot(by = marker, ncol = <<N>>) %>%
  adjust_size(width = 80, height = 40) %>%
  save_and_show("<<metric>>_fold_change")
```

## 3.3 log2 Fold change vs `r CTRL_LEVEL`

```{r log2fc, fig.height=4, fig.width=20}
df_long %>%
  filter(.data[[X_VAR]] != CTRL_LEVEL) %>%
  tidyplot(x = .data[[X_VAR]], y = log2FC, color = .data[[COLOR_VAR]]) %>%
  add_reference_lines(y = 0) %>%
  add_geometry() %>%
  adjust_colors(new_colors = COLORS) %>%
  adjust_title("<<Metric>> — log2 fold change vs control") %>%
  adjust_x_axis_title("<<x label>>") %>%
  adjust_y_axis_title("log2(FC) ± SD") %>%
  split_plot(by = marker, ncol = <<N>>) %>%
  adjust_size(width = 80, height = 40) %>%
  save_and_show("<<metric>>_log2FC")
```

<!-- Duplicate section 3 for each additional measurement family. -->

---

# 4 · Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
